# Daily Flow Summary

Attended the Denver Tech Summit. The morning keynote featured Juliet Capulet from Capulet Industries presenting on unified API gateways — remarkably similar to our own approach at Montague Tech.

Spent the afternoon at the hackathon with Mercutio building an API bridge prototype. Tybalt Capulet was hostile when he saw us talking to Juliet.

The evening mixer was the highlight — had a genuine conversation with Juliet about combining our companies' approaches. Exchanged Signal contacts. There is real potential here, but the company rivalry makes it complicated.
